title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 287.922 - Effective date
text:
287.922.  Effective date. — The repeal of sections 287.900, 287.902, 287.905, 287.907, 287.909, 287.910, 287.912, 287.915, 287.917, 287.919, and 287.920 of this act and the repeal and reenactment of sections 287.690 and 375.1275 of this act shall become effective on January 1, 2025.
(L. 2023 S.B. 101 § B)
